name: PR fetcher pauses or aborts when remaining rate-limit budget would be exhausted by the next batch (5000/hr GitHub default)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"remaining":3,"reset_at":"2026-05-13T01:00:00Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/rate-budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --batch-size 50 --rate-budget-stub .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/rate-budget.json --now 2026-05-13T00:30:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rate_limit_exceeded' err.txt && grep -q 'remaining=3' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
